title: Semi-Streaming Matching in a Single Pass II: Greedy is Optimal
byline: [Submitted on 16 Jul 2026 (v1), last revised 20 Jul 2026 (this version, v2)]
excerpt: We prove that no single-pass semi-streaming algorithm (deterministic or randomized) can achieve a better-than-half approximation to the maximum matching problem. This implies the optimality of the naive greedy algorithm, answering an outstanding open question in the graph streaming literature since the introduction of the model over two decades ago. Our proof follows the "blueprint framework" introduced previously by the authors, which reduced proving lower bounds for semi-streaming matching to constructing certain combinatorial objects called blueprints. We present an optimal construction of blueprints that when used in this framework implies our semi-streaming matching lower bound. Our results also imply that the optimal competitive ratio of online matching with preemption is half, again matching the naive greedy algorithm, settling this open question as well.
content_html:
View PDF HTML (experimental)

Abstract:We prove that no single-pass semi-streaming algorithm (deterministic or randomized) can achieve a better-than-half approximation to the maximum matching problem. This implies the optimality of the naive greedy algorithm, answering an outstanding open question in the graph streaming literature since the introduction of the model over two decades ago.
Our proof follows the "blueprint framework" introduced previously by the authors, which reduced proving lower bounds for semi-streaming matching to constructing certain combinatorial objects called blueprints. We present an optimal construction of blueprints that when used in this framework implies our semi-streaming matching lower bound.
Our results also imply that the optimal competitive ratio of online matching with preemption is half, again matching the naive greedy algorithm, settling this open question as well.
Comments: 23 pages, 3 figures. Version 2: Fixed typos and minor language issues throughout
Subjects: Data Structures and Algorithms (cs.DS); Computational Complexity (cs.CC)

blocks.html_en:
Abstract:We prove that no single-pass semi-streaming algorithm (deterministic or randomized) can achieve a better-than-half approximation to the maximum matching problem. This implies the optimality of the naive greedy algorithm, answering an outstanding open question in the graph streaming literature since the introduction of the model over two decades ago.
Our proof follows the "blueprint framework" introduced previously by the authors, which reduced proving lower bounds for semi-streaming matching to constructing certain combinatorial objects called blueprints. We present an optimal construction of blueprints that when used in this framework implies our semi-streaming matching lower bound.
Our results also imply that the optimal competitive ratio of online matching with preemption is half, again matching the naive greedy algorithm, settling this open question as well.

sentences.en: Abstract:We prove that no single-pass semi-streaming algorithm (deterministic or randomized) can achieve a better-than-half approximation to the maximum matching problem.
sentences.zh: 摘要：我们证明没有任何单通道半流算法（确定性或随机）能够对最大匹配问题实现优于一半的近似。

sentences.en: This implies the optimality of the naive greedy algorithm, answering an outstanding open question in the graph streaming literature since the introduction of the model over two decades ago.
sentences.zh: 这意味着朴素贪婪算法的最优性，回答了自二十多年前引入该模型以来图流文献中一个悬而未决的问题。

sentences.en: Our proof follows the "blueprint framework" introduced previously by the authors, which reduced proving lower bounds for semi-streaming matching to constructing certain combinatorial objects called blueprints.
sentences.zh: 我们的证明遵循作者之前介绍的“蓝图框架”，该框架减少了半流匹配的证明下限，以构造某些称为蓝图的组合对象。

sentences.en: We present an optimal construction of blueprints that when used in this framework implies our semi-streaming matching lower bound.
sentences.zh: 我们提出了蓝图的最佳构造，当在该框架中使用时，它意味着我们的半流匹配下限。

sentences.en: Our results also imply that the optimal competitive ratio of online matching with preemption is half, again matching the naive greedy algorithm, settling this open question as well.
sentences.zh: 我们的结果还表明，抢占式在线匹配的最佳竞争比是一半，再次匹配朴素的贪婪算法，也解决了这个悬而未决的问题。

content_html_zh:
查看 PDF HTML（实验性）

摘要：我们证明没有任何单通道半流算法（确定性或随机）能够对最大匹配问题实现优于一半的近似。 这意味着朴素贪婪算法的最优性，回答了自二十多年前引入该模型以来图流文献中一个悬而未决的问题。 我们的证明遵循作者之前介绍的“蓝图框架”，该框架减少了半流匹配的证明下限，以构造某些称为蓝图的组合对象。 我们提出了蓝图的最佳构造，当在该框架中使用时，它意味着我们的半流匹配下限。 我们的结果还表明，抢占式在线匹配的最佳竞争比是一半，再次匹配朴素的贪婪算法，也解决了这个悬而未决的问题。
评论： 23页，3张图。 版本 2：修复了全文中的拼写错误和小语言问题
